query:
SELECT lu.display_name, u.id as user_id, s.plan, s.status, s.trial_started_at, s.stripe_subscription_id
FROM line_users lu
JOIN users u ON lu.lineUserId = u.line_user_id
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.userId
WHERE lu.display_name LIKE '%舞%'
LIMIT 5;
